flatmates.name: Party Bro
eveningEvents: threw a wild party and trashed the living room
spilled beer all over the kitchen counter
left empty pizza boxes scattered everywhere
broke the TV while playing drinking games
passed out on the couch and made a mess

flatmates.name: Witchcore Girl
eveningEvents: summoned a demon that left scorch marks everywhere
conducted a ritual that stained the walls with mysterious symbols
brewed a potion that exploded in the kitchen
summoned spirits that knocked over all the furniture
created a portal that sucked up half the room's contents

flatmates.name: Startup Guy
eveningEvents: tested his 'revolutionary' dishwashing app and flooded the kitchen
conducted a 'disruption workshop' that destroyed the dining table
demoed his 'smart home' system that malfunctioned and broke everything
held a 'pitch meeting' that turned into a food fight
experimented with his 'automated cleaning robot' that went haywire
